title: Copper Kit
description: A simple mod to add more stuffs to do with copper
body:
The Copper Tools & Armor Mod expands the early-game Minecraft experience by introducing a comprehensive set of copper-based tools and armor. This mod addresses the often underutilized resource of copper, giving it a practical and appealing purpose beyond decorative blocks and lightning rods.

![Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08494887f28fb70bf5105e884d783d7e51a6c885.png)

This mod adds:

1. Copper Tools: A full set of tools, including a sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, and hoe, all crafted from copper ingots. These tools offer a tier between wood and stone, providing a smoother progression in the early game. Copper tools are slightly more durable than wooden tools and offer faster mining speeds, bridging the gap before stone tools are readily available.
   
2. Copper Armor: A complete set of copper armor, consisting of a helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots. This armor provides a decent level of protection, again fitting between leather and iron armor. It offers a stylish, reddish-brown alternative to other early-game armor options.
3. This mod fills a noticeable gap in the early game, providing players with a useful stepping stone between wood and stone/iron, also it gives copper a valuable purpose, making it more than just a decorative resource.

4. The copper armor provides a distinct visual style, offering a refreshing change from the standard early-game options, and is designed to be lightweight and compatible with most other mods, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable gameplay experience.
